steps.title: Match identical expressions
steps.content:
An equation has infinitely many solutions when both sides are the same expression for every value of $x$. Factor the left side.
$$
5x+20=5(x+4)
$$

steps.title: Compare the matching factor
steps.content:
The equation becomes
$$
5(x+4)=\frac{a(x+4)}{2}
$$
For the two sides to be identical, the coefficient multiplying $(x+4)$ must match.
